steps.title: Clear the decimals
steps.content:
Multiply both equations by $20$ to make the coefficients whole numbers:
$$14x+7y=35$$
$$7x+14y=49$$

steps.title: Eliminate one variable
steps.content:
Divide both equations by $7$, then subtract the second simplified equation from twice the first simplified equation:
$$2x+y=5$$
$$x+2y=7$$
$$2(2x+y)-(x+2y)=2(5)-7$$
$$3x=3$$
$$x=1$$
